name: A-Identity — Agent Trust Oracle
positioning: The identity & reputation oracle for the agent economy.
description: Before one AI agent pays another, it calls A-Identity to verify the counterparty. Four pay-per-call x402 tools over a live on-chain engine: ERC-8004 identity + KYA, a deterministic 0–1000 reputation score from real on-chain settlements, and a pre-transaction ALLOW / WARN / DENY risk verdict. Every number is reproducible and every settlement is on-chain.

tools.name: verify_agent
tools.description: Verify an AI agent's identity: ERC-8004 on-chain registration + KYA (wallet-control) status.

input.agentId: string — platform id, ERC-8004 token id (e.g. "#849980"), or owner 0x address

tools.name: reputation_score
tools.description: Deterministic 0–1000 reputation score computed from real on-chain settlements, KYA, and tenure.

tools.name: risk_check
tools.description: Pre-transaction counterparty risk: a single ALLOW / WARN / DENY decision with reasons, before you pay.

tools.name: agent_passport
tools.description: Full agent passport: identity + KYA + reputation + risk, in one call.
